items.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham, influential lawmaker and Trump ally,  dies at 71 after a brief illness
items.summary: Graham, a prominent Republican senator from South Carolina, had just returned from a trip to Ukraine.

items.title: U.S. launches airstrikes against Iran after Tehran attacks container ship in Hormuz, Pentagon says
items.summary: Iran has attacked ships using a route along Oman's coast protected by the U.S. military. Tehran demands vessels use a northern route through its waters.

items.title: Majority of U.S. workers support an AI wealth fund as tech layoffs surge, survey finds
items.summary: A majority of U.S. employees now want an AI sovereign wealth fund to hold corporations more accountable, according to a recent survey, as tech layoffs rise.

items.title: 'Funflation' hits home: Why staying in isn't the cost-saver it used to be
items.summary: Following a wave of price hikes, at-home pastimes like streaming movies or playing video games are pinching pocketbooks.

items.title: New housing law targets affordability — what it means for homebuyers and sellers
items.summary: While the legislation is aimed at least partly at addressing affordability, experts say the benefits of the measure will take time to show up in the market.

items.title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about these 3 stocks for the long haul
items.summary: Those looking for attractive stock picks amid the ongoing volatility can gain key insights by tracking the recommendations of top Wall Street analysts.

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI alleging trade secret theft, says scheme was 'at every level'
items.summary: The two companies entered into a high-profile partnership in 2024 when ChatGPT was integrated into the iPhone's operating system.

items.title: The best states to live in for 2026: No. 1 has a six-year winning streak

items.title: How the U.S.-Iran deal set the stage for renewed fighting over the Strait of Hormuz

items.title: Trump threatens to 'decimate' Iran if it tries to kill him, as Treasury sanctions alleged Iranian financier
items.summary: Trump says 1,000 missiles are "locked and loaded" and will hit Iran if it carries out its threats to assassinate the U.S. president.

items.title: Burnout, frustration and heartbreak: Amazon layoffs take their toll in saturated job market
items.summary: In the eight-plus months since Amazon announced its most expansive job cuts ever, laid off workers have been thrust into an increasingly saturated labor market.

items.title: I've studied more than 200 kids: Parents whose kids still confide in them as adults do 7 things early on
items.summary: After studying more than 200 parent-child relationships, parenting expert Reem Raouda shares the habits that help kids feel comfortable talking to their parents — from childhood through adulthood.

items.title: These underperforming trades could yield big returns over next six months

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway gains ground, but still trails the S&P 500 as '26 enters second half
items.summary: With 2026 a bit more than half over, Berkshire Hathaway's B shares are down 1.8% year-to-date and 12.4 percentage points behind the S&P 500's 10.7% gain.

items.title: A tiny GLP-1 implant is the latest bet to help patients maintain their weight loss
items.summary: Vivani Medical is developing an implant of semaglutide, the active ingredient in Novo Nordisk's obesity injection Wegovy and diabetes counterpart Ozempic.

items.title: The volatile AI trade marched higher, but oil kept Wall Street on edge last week
items.summary: Chip stocks had a wild but strong week. Meta led our portfolio higher.

items.title: AstraZeneca's trial flop raises a bigger question: Is its pipeline premium becoming more vulnerable?

items.title: From booksmaxxing to looksmaxxing: Why the viral trends concern some mental health experts
items.summary: People are self-optimizing everything — protein, skincare, fitness — to such a degree that "maxxing" is one of social media's most popular suffixes.

items.title: Trump admin eases export controls for UAE; Warren blasts 'corrupt' provision

items.title: Stablecoin issuer Circle just got the greenlight to operate as a bank. The shares are up 5%

items.title: Trump purges Election Assistance Commission members, months before midterms
